name: Core Docs
description: Documentation drafting, release writing, and architecture explanation skills.

skills.name: Architecture Changelog
skills.description: Turn raw implementation notes into a concise architecture changelog.
skills.prompt_template:
Rewrite the following implementation notes into a clean architecture changelog with sections for summary, changed systems, and follow-up work:

{input}

skills.name: README Polisher
skills.description: Turn rough project notes into a cleaner README section with stronger structure and concise wording.

skills.name: Release Notes Draft
skills.description: Convert raw change notes into release notes with highlights, notable changes, and boundaries.

skills.name: Issue Triage Summary
skills.description: Summarize a bug or feature issue into a maintainer-friendly triage note with area, impact, and next action.
